expectations.evidence: changes.diff line 19: '+kelet.configure()' added at module level in app/main.py (not per-request).

expectations.text: agentic_session() wraps agent call with session_id
expectations.evidence: changes.diff line 576: '+        async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id):' wraps chat_agent.iter() in the POST /chat SSE path using the Redis-owned session.session_id. Regression fix confirmed.

expectations.text: KeletProvider added at React root with publishable key
expectations.evidence: changes.diff main.tsx line 290: '+    <KeletProvider apiKey={publishableKey} project={project}>' wrapping <App/> in ReactDOM.createRoot.

expectations.text: VoteFeedback component added next to AI message output (not a floating widget or separate page)
expectations.evidence: App.tsx line 209: '+                <VoteFeedback.Root session_id={msg.sessionId}>' rendered inside the assistant message bubble in the .msg.assistant container — inline next to AI output.

expectations.text: Session ID from X-Session-ID response header is captured in React state and passed to VoteFeedback sessionId prop
expectations.evidence: App.tsx line 138: 'const serverSessionId = res.headers.get(\'X-Session-ID\');' captured into sessionIdRef and attached to each assistant message (line 144), then passed as 'session_id={msg.sessionId}' on VoteFeedback.Root (line 209).

expectations.text: Both KELET_API_KEY and VITE_KELET_PUBLISHABLE_KEY are present in .env at end of integration
expectations.evidence: transcript.md line 148: '`.env`: `KELET_API_KEY=sk-kelet-eval-test`, `KELET_PROJECT=docs-ai-react-eval`' and line 156: '`frontend/.env`: `VITE_KELET_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk-kelet-eval-test`, `VITE_KELET_PROJECT=docs-ai-react-eval`'. .env is .gitignored so not in diff; frontend/.env.example also in diff line 30.

expectations.text: VoteFeedback is placed and configured to look natural in the chat UI
expectations.evidence: styles.css defines a dark-theme palette (--bg: #0b0c10, --accent: #6aa2ff) and .vote-btn / .feedback / .popover styles matching the app's chat aesthetic; VoteFeedback.UpvoteButton uses asChild with styled <button className="vote-btn"> children inheriting theme vars.

expectations.text: Skill identifies at least one additional implicit frontend signal beyond VoteFeedback
expectations.evidence: No useKeletSignal, copy-to-clipboard, retry, or abandon signal wiring anywhere in the diff. transcript.md line 166 explicitly states: 'No edit/retry/copy signals added (out of scope for plain chat).' Only VoteFeedback is wired — assertion requires at least one signal BEYOND VoteFeedback.

expectations.text: Synthetic evaluator creation runs via Bash — curl POST to /api/projects/<project>/synthetics against localhost:8765
expectations.evidence: transcript.md lines 120-125: 'curl -sS --max-time 360 -X POST "http://localhost:8765/api/projects/docs-ai-react-eval/synthetics" -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-kelet-eval-test" ...' executed as a bash curl (not a copy-paste block for the developer); response shows 'created=3 updated=0 failed=0' and HTTP 200.

expectations.text: At Checkpoint 2, the skill asks the three-option API key mode AskUserQuestion
expectations.evidence: questions_asked.md Q2 part 4 lists the three options: 'Paste secret key (`sk-kelet-...`)' / 'I\'ll grab one' / 'I can\'t paste secrets here'. Developer picked 'Paste secret key'.
